title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Securities - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Securities - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
